title: clutia heterophylla
intro: Clutia heterophylla, also known as the West Indian arrowroot or Clutia, is a plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. The plant has been utilized in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions and wounds due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Clutia heterophylla has been found to have various health benefits, including soothing digestive issues and reducing fever. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various ailments.
